'''Confederacy Cruisers''' were [[air cruiser]]s employed by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] from the earliest months of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:FirstBattleSarapin.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Confederacy Cruisers [[Battle of Asteroid 426|attack]] [[Asteroid 426]] near [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]].]]
The Confederacy Cruiser's main role was as an air-to-surface [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]] platform. Its [[Cannon/Legends|cannon]] was an area-effect weapon, capable of wiping out large numbers of ground-based targets, often decimating [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] units. They were also effective at destroying enemy fortifications and [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]] emplacements.

==History==
They proved essential in allowing [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]] to negate the orbital defense net of [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]]. [[Cruiser/Legends|Cruiser]] was used again by [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] during [[Mission to Katanos VII]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
*{{Tales|19|Rather Darkness Visible}}
